pi_items.metadata_value: On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies
pi_items.verified_value: On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies
pi_items.source: Verified against seed_library.py CLASSIC_PAPERS and Einstein's actual paper from Annalen der Physik (https://users.physics.ox.ac.uk/~rtaylor/teaching/specrel.pdf)
Verified against seed_library.py CLASSIC_PAPERS line 54 and historical records
Verified in setup_task.sh line 28 which checks for 1906, and seed_library.py line 1004 which corrupts to 1906

Verified through multiple authoritative sources: seed_library.py line 52 lists 1905, and Einstein published 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' on June 30, 1905 in Annalen der Physik vol. 17, pp. 891-921. Confirmed via https://en.wikisource.org/wiki/On_the_Electrodynamics_of_Moving_Bodies_(1920_edition) and multiple academic sources.
Verified against seed_library.py CLASSIC_PAPERS line 67 and Shannon's actual paper
Verified in setup_task.sh line 29 which checks for 1950, and seed_library.py line 1006 which corrupts to 1950

Verified through multiple authoritative sources: seed_library.py line 68 lists 1948, and Shannon published 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' in Bell System Technical Journal, Vol. 27, No. 3-4, July and October 1948, pp. 379-423 and 623-656. Confirmed via https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/A_Mathematical_Theory_of_Communication and https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1002/j.1538-7305.1948.tb01338.x

privileged_info_summary: Task operates on synthetically generated data (10 classic papers seeded into Zotero via seed_library.py). Two papers have deliberately corrupted publication years: Einstein's 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' is set to 1906 (correct year: 1905, published June 30, 1905 in Annalen der Physik), and Shannon's 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' is set to 1950 (correct year: 1948, published in Bell System Technical Journal Vol. 27, July-October 1948). All metadata claims about paper titles, authors, wrong years, and correct years have been verified against both the seed script source code and authoritative historical sources.
